'''Sar Galva''' was a small [[Mining/Legends|mining]] outpost in the [[Murul Trench]] on [[Dac/Legends|Dac]].

==History==
The infamous [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaver]] [[Borun Call]] was from Sar Galva.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II (novelization)|''Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II'' novelization]] {{Ab|Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II (audiobook)}}
